nasb.text: Then he went with Joram the son of Ahab to war against Hazael king of Aram at Ramoth-gilead, and the Arameans wounded Joram.

esv.text: He went with Joram the son of Ahab to make war against Hazael king of Syria at Ramoth-gilead, and the Syrians wounded Joram.

cnv.text: 亞哈謝與亞哈的兒子約蘭往基列的拉末，同亞蘭王哈薛交戰；亞蘭人擊傷了約蘭。

ccb.text: 他联合亚哈的儿子约兰到基列的拉末与亚兰王哈薛交战。约兰受了伤，
